Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class IctDepositTravelRuleCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.IctDepositTravelRuleCreate
public class IctDepositTravelRuleCreate extends Object
IctDepositTravelRuleCreate

The travel rules associated with an ICT deposit
